inputs.label: Value
inputs.businessContext: The numeric value to be converted to engineering notation.

businessContext_i18n.en: The numeric value to be converted to engineering notation.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der numerische Wert, der in technische Notation umgewandelt werden soll.

inputs.label: Exponent
inputs.businessContext: The exponent of 10 for the value (e.g., 3 for thousands).

businessContext_i18n.en: The exponent of 10 for the value (e.g., 3 for thousands).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Exponent von 10 für den Wert (z. B. 3 für Tausender).

inputs.label: Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places in the mantissa.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places in the mantissa.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen in der Mantisse.

inputs.label: Min Exponent
inputs.businessContext: Minimum exponent for engineering notation (multiples of 3).

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum exponent for engineering notation (multiples of 3).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mühendislik gösterimi için minimum üs (3'ün katları)
businessContext_i18n.de: Minimaler Exponent für technische Notation (Vielfache von 3).

inputs.label: Max Exponent
inputs.businessContext: Maximum exponent for engineering notation (multiples of 3).

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum exponent for engineering notation (multiples of 3).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mühendislik gösterimi için maksimum üs (3'ün katları)
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximaler Exponent für technische Notation (Vielfache von 3).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
